calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Wanting-gradient navigation fix (EXQ-259 fix): SD-015, MECH-216, SD-012
items.notes: Fixes EXQ-259 FAIL: enables schema_wanting_enabled=True, use_resource_proximity_head=True, drive_weight=2.0. Three-phase training (P0 warmup, P1 wanting active, P2 eval). Paper gate experiment.

items.title: SD-013 contrastive counterfactual retest: interventional_fraction=0.5 (EXQ-330 fix)
items.notes: EXQ-330 FAIL: cf_gap_ratio=1.29-1.49x (threshold 2.0). Fix: interventional_fraction raised from 0.3 to 0.5 (50% of P1 steps apply margin loss vs 30%). Stronger threshold C2=2.0 to confirm genuine improvement. Two conditions: CONTRASTIVE (interventional_fraction=0.5) vs OBSERVATIONAL. Same architecture and environment as EXQ-330. SD-013 primary; ARC-033 C1 integrity check.

items.title: SD-021 descending pain modulation retest: E2 world-forward training added (EXQ-325 fix)
items.notes: EXQ-325 FAIL root cause: same training loop bug as EXQ-321. No E2 world_forward training, running_variance=0.50 frozen, beta_gate never elevated, SD-021 descending modulation path never reached. Fix: added wf_buf + wf_optimizer + update_running_variance per step; extended TRAIN_EPISODES 80->300; added beta_gate_bistable=True to both conditions (needed for gate to hold once elevated). claim_ids reduced to [SD-021] only -- MECH-090 and SD-011 are prerequisites used as substrate, not the variable being tested. C3: n_committed_steps_descending >= 10. limb_damage_enabled=True (SD-022) required for causal independence between z_harm_s and z_harm_a.

items.title: MECH-230 z_goal latent structure: homeostatic drive ablation (full run)
items.notes: Full real run (not dry run). EXQ-328a confirmed correct: harm_signal seeding + benefit_threshold calibration. EXQ-328a dry runs had 0 contact events (3 eps x 120 steps too short). MECH-112 split: this tests latent z_goal structure (MECH-230), not behavioral dissociation (MECH-229).

items.title: SD-015 nav integration fix: z_resource encoder wiring + harm_signal seeding
items.notes: Fixes EXQ-326: (1) SD-015 wiring fix applied (cfg.latent.use_resource_encoder=True after from_dims); (2) pre-step EMA seeding bug fixed (use harm_signal from env.step() on ttype==resource steps). EXQ-354 proved SD-015 and nav integration work when correctly applied. Tests SD-015 navigation aspect and MECH-229 behavioral dissociation in nav context.

items.title: MECH-231 E2 short-horizon efference-copy discriminative pair
items.notes: Corrected MECH-070 direction. Criteria inverted: E2 must degrade faster than E1 across horizons (short-horizon claim). C1 PASS expected (E2 better at h=1 action-conditioned), C2/C3 PASS expected (EXQ-212 showed slope_e2 << slope_e1 -- now a PASS criterion).

items.title: ARC-038 schema assimilation probe: optimizer isolation fix (EXQ-355 fix)
items.note: Optimizer isolation fix vs EXQ-355: e3_online_opt now excludes harm_eval parameters; e3_consolidation_opt covers ONLY harm_eval_head. Previously both optimizers covered all e3.parameters(), allowing online training (many harm events/ep) to overwrite consolidation updates (3 replay steps/quiescent). Both conditions were functionally identical as a result.

items.title: MECH-216 genuinely predictive wanting: future-target supervision with attenuated resource gradient
items.notes: Tests whether MECH-216 schema_salience can be genuinely predictive (fires on landmark cue before resource is visible) rather than reactive (detects current proximity). Key redesign vs EXQ-263b: (1) future-target supervision (binary: resource contact in next 10 steps) instead of current proximity; (2) resource_obs_scale=0.3 removes direct resource gradient shortcut; (3) landmark B as leading indicator. Conditions: PREDICTIVE_CUE_ON (n_landmarks_b=2, bias=0.8) vs PREDICTIVE_CUE_ABLATED (no landmarks). PASS requires: C1 CUE_ON future_target_corr > 0.10; C2 CUE_ON > ABLATED future_target_corr; C3 future_target_corr > resource_prox_corr. Smoke test passed 2026-04-17.

items.title: MECH-216 predictive wanting adjudication: dense environment fix (EXQ-332 sparse-label fix)
items.notes: Adjudication run resolving SD-023 1:1 conflict (EXQ-263b supports vs EXQ-332 does_not_support). EXQ-332 implementation gap: future_target_mean=0.0006 across 162k P1 steps -- ~10 resource contacts total, schema_readout_head learns constant-zero output (MSE dominated by zero-class). Fixes: (1) 8x8 grid + 4 resources vs 12x12 + 2 (contact rate ~10x higher); (2) FUTURE_WINDOW 10->30 (3x more positive labels per contact); (3) P1 episodes 180->240. C3 quality gate (positive_label_rate > 0.10) guards against sparse-label artifact reoccurrence. Landmark A in BOTH conditions controls for generic texture benefit. Smoke test passed 2026-04-17.
